title: aciphylla lyallii var. crenulata
intro: Aciphylla lyallii var. crenulata, also known as the Alpine Astelia or Mountain Astelia, is a perennial herb native to New Zealand. It is a member of the Asteliaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. The leaves of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
